prompt: With confirmed edge in position, choose raise.
why_v1: Raise applies pressure when stack depth and price support aggression.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raising fits because position plus depth gives you enough leverage to pressure capped continues before equity slips away.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raise is stronger here because the in-position depth setup gives you both leverage and room to pressure capped continues. With position and a clean edge working together, aggression wins more than a passive line.
